{{Quote|I had to take it easy before they gave us combat shields. Now I don't have to hold back.|Creb|<ref name="DFRS" />}}
'''Creb''' was a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==Biography==
Creb was one of the few TIE fighter pilots to survive more than ten combat missions; the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] was his sixteenth mission in less than two years. He was placed in command of the TIE fighters of the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']], forming [[Black Wing Squadron]]. The squadron was secretly based on [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], which he had much respect for and wished to fly against one day.<ref name="DFRS" /> Creb donated his DNA as part of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Mount Tantiss project]] to become a [[Clone template/Legends|genetic template]] for [[clone stormtrooper]]s.<ref name="TTS">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref>
